_comment: Rename this file to data.json to seed the app with demo data. Replace with your own items after running /collect-todo.

items.title: Q2 Roadmap Sheet — Scope confirmation needed
items.description: Maya Patel asks you to confirm the scope for the onboarding redesign before she sends it to engineering — she needs sign-off today.
items.quote: @alex.rivera Can you confirm the scope for the onboarding redesign row? I want to send this to the eng team today but need your sign-off on the effort estimate before I do.
items.quoteAuthor: Maya Patel · Q2 Roadmap Planning · Apr 28

items.title: PROJ-1842 — Payment retry logic: edge case unresolved
items.description: Sam Chen found a race condition in the payment retry flow and is blocked on your decision about how to handle concurrent retries.
items.quote: @alex.rivera I've hit a race condition when two retries fire within the same 500ms window. We can either queue them or deduplicate at the DB level — each has trade-offs. Can you weigh in so I can move forward? Blocking my PR.

items.title: Saved — #product: Pricing page copy needs approval
items.description: Jordan Lee needs your approval on the revised pricing page copy before the marketing team schedules the launch email.
items.quote: Hey @alex.rivera, the revised pricing page copy is ready for your final review. Marketing want to send the launch email on Friday so we need your sign-off by Thursday EOD. Doc is linked above.

items.title: PROJ-1798 — Mobile nav: accessibility audit findings
items.description: Chris Taylor has completed the accessibility audit and assigned you 4 failing items that need product decisions before engineering can fix them.
items.quote: Accessibility audit is done. 4 items are failing WCAG AA — I've tagged them all as 'needs-product-decision' because they involve UX trade-offs, not just code fixes. @alex.rivera these need your input before we can action them.

items.title: #eng-backend — Confirm staging deploy window
items.description: Sam Chen asks you to confirm a staging deploy window for the payment service upgrade so the team can coordinate testing.
items.quote: @alex.rivera what's your preferred window for the staging deploy? We're flexible between Tuesday afternoon and Wednesday morning. Just need confirmation so we can get QA booked in.

items.title: Sprint Tracker — Effort estimate missing for onboarding tickets
items.description: Maya Patel flagged that three onboarding tickets in the sprint tracker are missing your effort estimates, holding up capacity planning.
items.quote: @alex.rivera rows 14, 17, and 21 are missing effort estimates — these are the three onboarding tickets. I can't finish capacity planning for the sprint until these are filled in. Could you add them today?

items.title: DM from Jordan — Enterprise customer asking about SSO timeline
items.description: Jordan Lee has a Tier 1 enterprise customer asking when SSO will be available — needs your input on the timeline to respond.
items.quote: Hey Alex, Meridian (our largest enterprise customer) is pushing hard on SSO again. Their IT team has made it a blocker for renewing. Can you give me something concrete I can tell them — even a rough quarter would help.

items.title: Saved — #design: New component library proposal
items.description: Chris Taylor shared a proposal to adopt a new internal component library — flagged for your awareness, no immediate action required.
items.quote: Sharing a proposal to move our UI to a shared internal component library. It would unify the web and mobile design tokens and cut our CSS bundle by ~30%. Happy to walk anyone through it — not urgent but would love product's perspective.

archivedItems.title: #product — v2.4 launch went smoothly
archivedItems.description: Jordan Lee confirmed the v2.4 launch completed without issues — FYI, no action needed.
archivedItems.quote: v2.4 is live. Zero errors in the first hour, Sentry is clean. Good work everyone.

archivedItems.title: PROJ-1755 — Add scope and acceptance criteria
archivedItems.description: Sam Chen asked you to fill in the scope and ACs for this ticket so the team can pick it up in the next sprint.
archivedItems.quote: @alex.rivera this ticket has been sitting in Backlog for two weeks without a description. Can you add the scope and acceptance criteria so we can estimate it for next sprint?
